lessons.title: Asking for Directions
lessons.description: Learn how to ask for directions and navigate in English. This lesson covers common phrases for requesting help, understanding street names, and following simple instructions.

content.title: Asking for Directions
content.description: In this lesson, you will learn useful words and sentences for asking and understanding directions.

content.meaning: A place where two or more roads meet.

content.example: Walk straight ahead for two blocks.

content.instruction: Match the word with its meaning.

content.explanation: Use this sentence when asking for directions.
examples: How do I get to the train station?
How do I get to the museum?

activity.question: How do I get to the _____ ?

content.example: The hotel is within walking distance.

content.explanation: Ask whether a place is close enough to walk to.
examples: Is the station within walking distance?
Is the restaurant within walking distance?

content.instruction: Arrange the words into a correct sentence.

content.scenario: You are looking for the train station.

dialogue.speaker: You
dialogue.text: How do I get to the train station?

dialogue.speaker: Local
dialogue.text: Go straight ahead and turn left at the intersection.

activity.question: You want to find the museum. What should you ask?
options: How do I get to the museum?
activity.correctAnswer: How do I get to the museum?

lessons.title: Reserve Hotel Room
lessons.description: Learn how to reserve a hotel room in English. This lesson covers common phrases for making a reservation, asking about amenities, and checking in and out of a hotel.

lessons.title: Asking about Transportation
lessons.description: Learn how to ask about transportation options in English. This lesson covers common phrases for requesting information about buses, trains, taxis, and other forms of transport.

lessons.title: Social Interactions
lessons.description: Learn vocabulary related to social situations and interactions. This lesson includes words for common social scenarios, expressing opinions, and engaging in polite conversation.

lessons.title: Shopping and Dining
lessons.description: Learn how to talk about shopping and dining experiences in English. This lesson covers common phrases for asking for help, making purchases, and ordering food.
